license: Pexels License (free for commercial and personal use, no attribution required) — https://www.pexels.com/license/
processing: Trimmed to <=10s, scaled to 1280x720, audio stripped, re-encoded libx264 crf26 yuv420p, native frame rate preserved.
verification: Camera motion measured per clip: cumulative frame-to-frame affine trajectory (OpenCV LK optical flow + RANSAC, dominant motion = camera). Frames inspected manually: single person, full body in frame.

fixtures.scenario: slow stretching with forward fold (bent-torso pose case), senior subject (body/age diversity), greenhouse background with plants and water mist (background motion stress, camera fixed)
fixtures.author: Marcus Aurelius

fixtures.scenario: full body inversion (handstand splits), hard case for pose orientation, urban background
fixtures.author: Allan Mas

fixtures.scenario: fast full-body dance movement, indoor home environment (matches real user scenario), full body with feet visible
fixtures.author: Artem Podrez

rejected.reason: slow zoom-in: max_zoom_dev=18.76%, max_pan=121px — fails static-camera requirement
camera walks through scene: max_zoom_dev=36.19%, max_pan=2581px
